rulings.Case Title: REGINA M. THOMSON VS. THOMAS HARRIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 21, 2008 LINE 20. CROSS-DEFENDANTS LEWIS CANYON AND PACIFIC CAPITAL HOLDINGS, INC.'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement IS APPROVED. HARRIS HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT HE IS ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES THROUGH INDEMNIFICATION. THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES INTENTIONAL CONDUCT BY HARRIS, NOT A WRONG BASED ON THE BROKER'S CONDUCT AND THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT HARRIS REQUESTED THE BROKER TO DEFEND HIM. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 21, 2008 LINE 8. CROSS-DEFENDANTS STUDIO MEHLER, DORIS MEHLER, JAMES SAYLES AND KEN BUGHARDT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTANED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BY MARCH 30, 2008 PER STIPULATION. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: NINA GURALNIK VS. FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE, A COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Leave To File A Xcomplaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 21, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S MOTION For Leave To File A CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PRESENT ANY FACTUAL BASIS FOR THE DELAY IN SEEKING THIS AMENDMENT. IN SEEKING TO AMEND THE ANSWER, DEFENDANT ASSERTED THAT THE INSURED "WILLFULLY CONCEALED OR MISREPRESENTED MATERIAL FACTS." ASSUMING THOSE STATEMENTS WERE MADE IN GOOD FAITH, DEFENDANT'S RIGHT TO RESCIND WAS KNOWN THEN. PLAINTIFF DEMONSTRATES PREJUDICE AND PRESENTS EXPERT TESTIMONY THAT THE DELAY BY DEFENDANT IS A BAD FAITH LITIGATION TACTIC. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL SHERWOOD VS. CYNTHIA MARKOWITZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Cynthia Markowitz And Richard Markowitz Motion To Quash Unlawful Detainer For Violating Ccc 1942.4, Improper 3 Day Notice And Improper Service Of 3 Day Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 21, 2008 LINE 19. DEFENDANTS CYNTHIA MARKOWITZ AND RICHARD MARKOVITZ'S MOTION TO QUASH UNLAWFUL DETAINER FOR VIOLATING C.C.C. SECTION 1942.4, IMPROPER THREE DAY NOTICE AND IMPROPER SERVICE OF THREE DAY NOTICE IS DENIED; FIVE DAYS TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT. THE COURT MAY ONLY LOOK TO THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT TO RULE ON THE SUBJECT MOTION. IT PROPERLY ALLEGES A THREE DAY NOTICE. THE OTHER ISSUES REQUIRE CONSIDERATION OF EXTRINSIC EVIDENCE AND DEFENDANTS WILL HAVE TO FILE A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION TO ADDRESS THOSE ISSUES. =(302/PJM/AL)
